prompt: Create a full-body tokusatsu-style enemy kaijin monster suit that looks like a humanoid made from a vintage car, standing in a dynamic studio character render on a plain white background. The villain should be centered, facing forward in a powerful action pose with one clawed hand reaching toward the viewer and the other arm bent outward. Use a bulky practical-suit aesthetic with glossy hard armor, rubbery black undersuit joints, and exaggerated monster proportions. The torso is the front half of an old sedan: silver hood and fenders as chest armor, large chrome grille in the center, two round headlights, bumper pieces, dark windshield panels forming the upper shoulders, and worn red flame-like paint streaks over chipped silver metal. The head is a sinister car-themed skull helmet above the hood, with glowing red eyes, a vertical chrome grille mouth, angular cheek spikes, side fins, and a red mohawk-like fin on top. Include exactly 6 visible wheel elements: 1 spare tire mounted near the right shoulder, 1 wheel on the right thigh/hip area, 1 wheel on the left outer thigh, 1 wheel on the right shin, and 2 partially visible tire-like wheel details integrated into the torso/arm structure. The arms are armored with car body panels and end in sharp silver talons; add red-and-silver spiked cuffs, with exactly 5 claws visible on the forward left hand and exactly 4 claws visible on the right hand. The legs are black ribbed mechanical suit material with silver knee armor, red flame-painted shin guards, chunky monster boots, and metallic toe claws. Add a circular belt emblem at the waist like a nautical steering-wheel gear medallion in blue and gold. Color palette: weathered silver chrome, black rubber, blood red paint, dark shadows, and small gold headlight accents. Render as a high-detail realistic action figure / practical monster costume photo, dramatic but clean studio lighting, crisp edges, no text, no logo, no scenery, no watermark. Optional customization: make the monster theme vintage car kaijin, main armor color weathered silver chrome, accent paint color blood red flame streaks, eye color glowing red, background plain white studio background.
